subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! A passage from the Al-Mu'ayyad journal, which is the foremost newspaper of the Egyptian realm and whose proprietor is renowned throughout all regions, is being sent [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان قطعه‌ئی از جریدهٴ مؤیّد که اوّل روزنامهٴ خطّهٴ مصریست و صاحبش معروف آفاق ارسال میشود
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @loving one's enemies; returning hatred with love
